message:
fix(gui): remove orphaned tab after spawning floating pane

When spawning a floating pane, spawn_tab_or_window creates a temporary
tab in the window to hold the pane. After moving the pane to the active
tab's floating layer, the orphaned tab was left in the window's tab list,
causing it to appear in the tab bar and leaving the pane referenced from
two locations simultaneously. Now properly removes the orphaned tab from
the window after the pane is moved to floating.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
